hero.title: Safety and verification come before everything else
hero.subhead: Use this page as your public check point before you act, click, or reply.

paragraphs: Most scams succeed by creating urgency, confusion, or fake authority. A calm verification habit breaks that pattern and gives you control.
When in doubt, stop and check official channels in public. The goal is not speed; the goal is safe, repeatable decisions.

whatThisMeans.title: What this means
items: Never share your seed phrase or private keys.

verification.title: Official link verification instruction
verification.intro: Before you trust any message, confirm you are looking at the right public source.
verification.instruction: Only trust links listed in the verified section on this page and in the footer.

adminRules.title: Admin behavior rules
adminRules.intro: Legitimate support behavior follows clear patterns you can verify in public.
items: Admins never start private support in direct messages.
Moderation guidance is posted in public channels.
Any account asking for secrets is treated as unsafe.

reporting.title: If you see scam or impersonation
reporting.intro: If something feels suspicious, use this simple reporting routine.
steps: Take a screenshot of the suspicious message or profile.
Report it in the official Telegram channel with context.
Block and ignore the account after reporting.
